    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    L

    lastName - Variable in class application.User
     
    layout - Variable in class application.UserDatabaseUI
     
    loadAllAnswersBy(String) - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Loads all the answers by a specific reviewer.
    loadAllAnswersByReviewers() - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Loads all answers by a specific reviewer.
    loadAllReviews(String) - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Method to load all reviews by a specific reviewer
    loadAllReviewsGUI(List<Review>) - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Loads the GUI to display all reviews.
    loadReviewerAnswersGUI(List<Answer>) - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Loads the reviewer answer UI.
    loadReviewers() - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Method to load and display reviewers.
    loadThread(Question) - Method in class application.StudentQAPage
    Method to display a question thread.
    loadUserData() - Method in class application.UserDatabaseUI
    Loads user data and displays it.
    login(User) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Log user into the system.
    looksLikeTechnicalTerm(String) - Static method in class application.SpellChecker
    Checks if a word looks like a technical term.
